summary: Frontend-only validation completed for demo-user dropdown auto-login feature on public URL. Dropdown is visible, contains all required demo accounts, selecting each account logs in immediately to the correct role board, and manual login still works.
action_items: Optional cleanup: investigate console hydration warning ('<span> cannot be a child of <option>') observed on role board render.
Optional cleanup: reduce expected 401/422 console noise from non-applicable board API calls for some roles if desired.
critical_code_review_comments: Role board render logs an HTML nesting/hydration warning for <option> content; not blocking this feature but should be cleaned up to avoid future UI regressions.
context_for_next_testing_agent: This run covered only login-page demo dropdown behavior. Public URL used from frontend/.env. Verified all six demo accounts auto-login to correct role board and manual login remains functional.
rca of the issue: No functional defect found in requested scope. Earlier failed check was due Playwright API mismatch in the test script (wait_for_response unsupported in this runner), not app behavior.
mocked_api_status: No mocked APIs used in this run; backend integration tested against live public endpoints.
